'''tawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrennially|quadrennially]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrennially|quadrennially]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tawate|tawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tawatesher|tawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tawatesherĂ«m|tawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tawatero|tawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tawateshĂ«|tawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tawateshĂ«m|tawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitawatero|gokitawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitawateshĂ«|gokitawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitawateshĂ«m|gokitawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotawankerom|gotawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotawankeshĂ«|gotawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotawankeshĂ«m|gotawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotawankeya|gotawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tawaterom|tawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tawatemu|tawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tawateya|tawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitawaterom|gokitawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitawatemu|gokitawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitawateya|gokitawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tawawate|tawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tawawatesher|tawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tawawatesherĂ«m|tawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tawawatero|tawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tawawateshĂ«|tawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tawawateshĂ«m|tawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitawawatero|gokitawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitawawateshĂ«|gokitawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitawawateshĂ«m|gokitawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotawawankerom|gotawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotawawankeshĂ«|gotawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotawawankeshĂ«m|gotawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotawawankeya|gotawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tawawaterom|tawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tawawatemu|tawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tawawateya|tawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitawawaterom|gokitawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitawawatemu|gokitawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitawawateya|gokitawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠwĂŠte|tĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠwĂŠtesher|tĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠwĂŠtero|tĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠwĂŠtero|gokitĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠwĂŠterom|tĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠwĂŠtemu|tĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠwĂŠteya|tĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠwĂŠterom|gokitĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠwĂŠteya|gokitĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafwafte|tafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafwaftesher|tafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafwaftesherĂ«m|tafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafwaftero|tafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafwafteshĂ«|tafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafwafteshĂ«m|tafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafwaftero|gokitafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafwafteshĂ«|gokitafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafwafteshĂ«m|gokitafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafwafnkerom|gotafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafwafnkeshĂ«|gotafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafwafnkeshĂ«m|gotafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafwafnkeya|gotafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafwafterom|tafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafwaftemu|tafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafwafteya|tafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafwafterom|gokitafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafwaftemu|gokitafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafwafteya|gokitafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
